title: Glass Koi Fish Shaped Bottle | Nautical Blue Fish Design Decorative Glass Bottle ~ 29cm – Colour Varies, One Supplied
features: FISH SHAPED DESIGN | This beautifully crafted glass bottle features a detailed koi fish shape with a silicone stopper, offering a unique and eye-catching look.
DECORATIVE USE ONLY | Intended purely as a decorative piece, this bottle is perfect for styling shelves, countertops, vanities, or dining displays.
COASTAL DÉCOR | Adds a nautical touch to kitchens, living rooms, bathrooms, or bars—ideal for themed interiors or ocean-inspired spaces.
GIFT-WORTHY | A thoughtful gift for décor lovers, beach house owners, or anyone who appreciates distinctive glassware.

SIZE & COLOUR | Measures approximately 26cm in height. Made from coloured blue glass with a detailed textured surface. Available in two shades of blue—one will be supplied at random. For specific colour requests, please contact customer service.
